title: Shield Expansion Expansion
description: Adds two new types of shields for each material tier.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4qZj1oRi/images/deabb682bb428a1e047a827ff388fc4cef56ccc5.png)
## Introduction
Shield Expansion Expansion is an addon for [Shield Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-expansion). It adds two new types of shields for every material tier: A regular **Shield** and a **Tower Shield**. 

**Tower Shields** are a heavier version of the normal shields. They have a **longer parrying window**, **higher stamina** and a **higher blast resistence**. The **Shields** have a **faster walking speed** while blocking, **higher parrying damage** and a **lower cooldown**.

This mod is meant to be played with [<ins>dixta's Armory</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/dixtas-armory).


## Recommended mods
[<ins>Shield Expansion</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-expansion)   -   **Required**\
[<ins>dixta's Armory</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/dixtas-armory)   -   Adds many new weapons to the game.\
[<ins>Model Gap Fix</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)   -   Fixes the small gaps appearing in items. 



## Compatible mods
[<ins>dixta's Armory</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/dixtas-armory)   -   Full compatibility\
[<ins>Oreganized</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/oreganized)   -   WIP compatibility\
[<ins>Enlightend</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/enlightend)   -   WIP compatibility\
[<ins>Caverns & Chasms</ins>](www.youtube.com)   -   Planned compatibility\
[<ins>Undead Unleashed!</ins>](https://modrinth.com/mod/undead-unleashed)   -   Planned compatibility



## FAQ
**Will this mod be available for other versions?**\
Yes, I plan on porting the mod to 1.19.2 and any newer, popular version.

**What modloader is this mod for?**\
It's currently only available for Forge. Depending on how popular the mod is going to be, I might consider porting it to Fabric.

**Can I use this mod in my modpack?**\
Yes, absolutely!
